description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Static code analysis (clang-tidy) that runs on push and on opened, synchronized, or reopened pull requests. Use an ubuntu-latest job to install dependencies, set up Clang-Tidy 15, prepare the Vulkan SDK, configure the project with CMake using Clang 15, and then run Clang-Tidy static code analysis on C++ files with specific checks and filters.
